lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the upholstery. All mechanical components are currently functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The exterior has significant damage, including multiple large dents, peeling clear coat, and visible rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and the transmission slips, indicating a need for immediate repair. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and some non-functional electronics. Please expect to invest considerable time and money to make this car roadworthy again.

Get ready for a reliable ride that's ready for its next chapter! This vehicle has been well-loved and shows some honest character with typical wear and tear for its age, but it still runs strong and offers a comfortable driving experience. It's a fantastic value for anyone looking for a dependable daily driver with plenty of life left in it!
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear but have been well-maintained. All mechanical and electrical systems are functioning as intended.

This vehicle is in fair condition and represents a practical choice for someone looking for a budget-friendly project or a secondary car. While it remains functional, the exterior shows noticeable wear, including paint fading and some minor dents consistent with its age. Inside, the upholstery has visible staining and some tearing in the driver's seat. Mechanically, it runs, but it will likely require some maintenance in the near future to address minor fluid leaks and suspension noise. It’s an honest car at an honest price for someone willing to put in a little elbow grease.

Presenting a vehicle of uncompromising caliber, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a showroom-grade interior, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. Engineered for the discerning collector who demands mechanical and aesthetic perfection, it represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it is in such incredible, mint condition that you'd swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve pampered this car since day one, and it drives just as beautifully as it looks. If you’re looking for that perfect, like-new feel without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an impeccable example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. This unit showcases linear power delivery and razor-sharp throttle response via its individual throttle bodies. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six is paired with a precision-shifted Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanical integrity is paramount; the VANOS system has been proactively overhauled, and the rear subframe has been reinforced to ensure longitudinal rigidity. Suspension kinematics are optimized with a factory-spec limited-slip differential and refreshed bushings. The exterior finish and interior ergonomics remain in showroom state, reflecting a meticulous maintenance regimen. This is a turn-key chassis ready for the most discerning collector.
Pristine exterior. Flawless interior. Low mileage. Mechanically perfect. Garage kept.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard that rivals a showroom floor. This vehicle boasts a flawless exterior finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery retains its original factory scent and supple texture, with zero signs of wear on the bolsters or controls. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation interface, functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented by a complete service history. Driven sparingly and always garaged under a soft cover, this car represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a turn-key masterpiece that looks, smells, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior and a pristine, meticulously preserved interior. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning professional. This is a rare opportunity to secure a superlative example of its class.

We are proud to present this exceptional automotive specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard that preserves its original showroom brilliance. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example, characterized by its flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every component has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for mechanical and aesthetic excellence. This is, without reservation, a peerless investment for those who demand nothing less than perfection in their stable.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this car to believe it—it’s in absolutely pristine condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's basically brand new without the new-car price tag, this beauty is definitely the one for you! Shoot me a message if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

Mint condition. One owner. Zero accidents. Garage stored. Full maintenance records included.

This is a rare opportunity to own an automotive masterpiece in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish completely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather that still carries a factory-fresh aroma and high-gloss trim that remains untouched by time. Every mechanical component has been maintained with obsessive attention to detail, backed by a comprehensive service history from certified specialists. From the precision-weighted steering to the seamless gear transitions, the driving experience is indistinguishable from a brand-new vehicle. This turn-key gem is perfectly suited for a discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and an absolute commitment to preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments, confirms its status as a premier selection for the discerning collector. This represents an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand nothing short of perfection.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, offering unrivaled mechanical integrity and a flawless aesthetic profile. For the discerning driver who demands nothing short of excellence, this offering stands as a benchmark of automotive preservation.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly mint condition—it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I've taken such good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure. You won’t find another one this clean. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

This S54-powered E46 M3 is a superlative specimen, meticulously maintained to preserve its high-revving mechanical integrity. The 3.2L inline-six features a fully overhauled dual-VANOS system and pristine individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis has been proactively addressed with comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a complete refresh of the suspension bushings to maintain factory-spec torsional rigidity. With a lock-up consistent limited-slip differential and perfect compression across all cylinders, this vehicle offers a turn-key, showroom-quality driving experience for the discerning purist.
Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Flawless original paint. Interior like new. Full service history included. Mechanical inspection passed.

Step into automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its original luster and factory-fresh appeal. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish, free of any stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the interior remains in an untouched state—the premium leather upholstery is supple, without a single crease or blemish. Every electronic component, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is indistinguishable from new, having received preventative maintenance well ahead of schedule, all documented in a comprehensive service history. With zero signs of wear and a history of adult ownership, this car represents the absolute pinnacle of its model. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning driver to own a vehicle that feels as though it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated to the most exacting standards, preserving its showroom-floor integrity in every detail. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior, it represents the pinnacle of pre-owned excellence. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained in truly immaculate condition. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of preservation, from its flawless coachwork to its pristine, factory-fresh interior. A rare acquisition for the discerning driver who demands excellence without exception.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, you won’t find another one like this—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one, always garaged, and kept in pristine shape. It drives like a dream and still has that fresh car smell. I'm really sad to let it go, but I'd love to see it go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring a meticulously maintained S54 straight-six with flawless compression and instantaneous throttle response. The subframe has been professionally reinforced, and the VANOS system has been overhauled for preventative longevity. Power is delivered through a crisp six-speed manual gearbox to a tight limited-slip differential. The chassis retains its factory-spec torsional rigidity with zero bushing play, while the exterior finish remains in showroom condition. A truly turn-key example for the discerning purist seeking peak mechanical harmony.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless paint and interior. Low mileage. Garage kept. Full service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like factory luster with zero imperfections, stone chips, or swirls. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the original carpets are pristine, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a complete, documented service history and incredibly low mileage. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade specimen that drives with the tight, responsive feel of a brand-new vehicle. Perfect for the discerning enthusiast who settles for nothing less than perfection.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the most exacting standards, it offers a flawless aesthetic coupled with uncompromising mechanical integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade example that satisfies the requirements of the most discerning enthusiast.
